topics.title: Ted Lasso's Toheeb Jimoh and Snow White's Dujonna Gift to Lead BBC's 'Open Water' Adaptation
topics.angle: Ted Lasso star Toheeb Jimoh and Snow White star Dujonna Gift have been cast as leads in the BBC's adaptation of Caleb Azumah Nelson's novel 'Open Water'.

sources.headline: Ted Lasso Star Toheeb Jimoh Snow White s Dujanna Gift Leading BBC s Open Water Adaptation
sources.summary: Emmy-nominated Ted Lasso star Toheeb Jimoh and Snow White star Dujonna Gift are leading the BBC s adaptation of Caleb Azumah Nelson’s Open Water. Jimoh plays Marcus opposite Gift s Effie. Marcus works in retail while trying to develop a career as a photographer. Effie is studying dance at university in Dublin. topics.title: Netflix Announces New Live-Action 'Parasyte: Tamiya' Series
topics.angle: Netflix is expanding the 'Parasyte' universe with a new live-action series titled 'Parasyte: Tamiya,' starring Shioli Kutsuna.

sources.headline: Netflix Steps Back Into Parasyte Universe With Tamiya
sources.summary: Netflix has returned to the Parasyte manga universe that began in 2024 with Parasyte: The Grey. A new live-action series, Parasyte: Tamiya will star Shioli Kutsuna (Sanctuary, Deadpool 2) and will stream in 2027. topics.title: Netflix Reteams With Yeon Sang-ho for Parasyte: Tamiya Series

sources.headline: Netflix Reteams With Yeon Sang-ho for Parasyte: Tamiya Series
sources.summary: The 'Parasyte: The Grey' follow-up will star Japanese actress Shioli Kutsuna as the original manga's fan-favorite parasite Ryoko Tamiya — a human, a monster and something in between.

sources.headline: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to Parasyte Universe With Tamiya, Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
sources.summary: Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the Parasyte universe with Parasyte: Tamiya, a new live-action series starring Shioli Kutsuna for Netflix, set to stream in 2027.
